articles.title: Runway Exposes Gen-4.5, Kling, and GPT Image 2 via MCP — Creative Models Now Callable Inside Claude, Cursor, and Replit Agents
articles.summary: Runway plugged its creative model suite into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and Replit via MCP, making image and video generation callable directly inside AI agent workflows. Runway Gen-4.5, Kling, and GPT Image 2 are all exposed through the integration.

articles.title: Kling AI Skill Launches for Agent Workflows — Text-to-Video, 4K Images, and Cross-Scene Consistency in Claude and Cursor
articles.summary: Kling AI launched a dedicated Skill for AI agent workflows, enabling text/image to video generation, 4K image generation, style transfer, and cross-scene consistency with custom elements. Works natively with Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, and OpenClaw.

articles.title: Motion Launches Motion API — Connect the AI Motion Design Tool Directly Into Claude, Codex, OpenClaw, and Hermes
articles.summary: Motion released the Motion API, enabling one-click integration of the AI motion design tool directly into Claude, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes, and other AI frameworks. Agents can now generate motion design content as part of automated creative workflows.

articles.title: X Square Robot Releases Open-Source WALL-WM World Model For Embodied AI
Anthropic Releases Opus 4.8 With Strong Agentic Coding Benchmarks
ElevenLabs Launches Dubbing V2 — SOTA Audio-to-Audio Dubbing That Preserves Emotion in 90+ Languages
articles.summary: ElevenLabs introduced Dubbing V2, described as the world's state-of-the-art model for high-quality dubbing. The Audio-to-Audio model preserves the original speaker's emotion and intent across 90+ languages. Available now through ElevenCreative, with API access coming soon.

articles.title: Hexo Releases SIA — Open-Source Self-Improving AI That Updates Its Own Weights During Goal Pursuit
articles.summary: Hexo released SIA, an open-source Self-Improving AI that achieves goals through recursive self-improvement — updating its own capabilities as it works toward a goal, not just calling tools with fixed capabilities. The announcement earned 221 likes and 80,000 views.

articles.title: Shift Launches in NYC — AI Economy Startup Offers Free Home Cleaning to Bridge Today's Economy to the AI Abundance Era
articles.summary: Shift launched in New York City with a mission to bridge the current economy into the AI economy where goods, services, and leisure become affordable through AI. The launch includes free home cleaning as the entry product.

articles.title: minWM: A Full-Stack Open-Source Framework for Real-Time Interactive Video World Models
DeepSeek's Deli Chen releases an LLM continual learning survey paper generated autonomously by the DeliAutoResearch systemIt maps out self-improvement methods like STaR and o1.
ElevenLabs Releases Dubbing V2 With Emotion-Preserving Multilingual Audio
OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, giving U.S. government agencies access to its specialized GPT-Rosalind modelThe initiative focuses on defending against engineered pathogens.
Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.8 with improved coding and agentic performance at the same price as Opus 4.7
100% AI Product Videos Made in Under 5 Minutes Achieve Commercial Quality — Realism Framework Hits New Threshold
articles.summary: AI-generated product videos made in under 5 minutes are reaching commercial marketing quality, with a realism framework demonstrating results compelling enough for real product ads. The UGC video format has become the clearest commercial use case for AI video generation.

articles.title: Garry Tan Endorses Hermes Agent Stack — YC President's 600-Like Post Signals Mainstream Adoption
articles.summary: Y Combinator President Garry Tan publicly endorsed his OpenClaw/Hermes Agent setup as significantly improved, with the post generating 600+ likes. The endorsement signals that open-source agent coordination has crossed from early adopter into mainstream developer infrastructure.
